KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JUSTIN LEE GOREE'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT. IN LIGHT OF THE LATE-FILED OPPOSITION AND THE FAILURE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 2.6B, THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 26, 2012 AT 9:30 AM PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS ARE TO BE DELIVERED NO LATER THAN MARCH 14, 2012 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALEJANDRO CALUGAY'S MOTION OPPOSING DEFENDANT JUSTIN GOREE'S APPLICATION FOR GOOD FAITH DETERMINATION. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTEST GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. THERE IS INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE IN THE RECORD FOR THE COURT TO CONCLUDE THAT THE SETTLEMENT IS IN THE BALLPARK. MATTCO FORGE, INC. V. ARTHUR YOUNG & CO. (1995) 38 CAL.APP.4TH 1337, 1350, N.6. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: RHONDA AQUILINA, CSR 	956

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement; Pos
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JUSTIN LEE GOREE'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement is Granted. An insurance policy limits settlement by a defendant with essentially no assets is made in good faith as that phrase is used in Code of Civil Procedure 877.6. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
= (302/HEK)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement; Pos
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Continued To Mar-26-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court modified its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JUSTIN LEE GOREE'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement. In light of the late-filed opposition and the failure to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers pursuant to Local Rule 2.6B, the motion is continued to March 26, 2012 at 9:30 am per agreement of the parties. Courtesy copies of the moving papers are to be delivered no later than March 14, 2012 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Granting Leave To Amend Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-COMPLAINANANT DAVID DECEOURSTY'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO AMEND CROSS COMPLAINT.
Appearances: David L. Hart of the Law offices o David L. Hart (650.355.3000) for plaintiff and responding party; Salvador A. Liccardo of the Liccardo Law Firm (310.944. 9708) appearing via Court call for plaintiff and responding party.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Defendant has not shown diligence in seeking relief and allowing the amendment at this stage of the case would prejudice plaintiff. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion Opposing Deft Justin Goree'S Application For Good Faith Determination
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ALEJANDRO CALUGAY'S MOTION OPPOSING DEFENDANT JUSTIN GOREE'S APPLICATION FOR GOOD FAITH DETERMINATION.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTEST GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. THERE IS INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE IN THE RECORD FOR THE COURT TO CONCLUDE THAT THE SETTLEMENT IS IN THE BALLPARK. MATTCO FORGE, INC. V. ARTHUR YOUNG & CO. (1995) 38 CAL.APP.4TH 1337, 1350, n.6. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, CSR 956
